ddls:
CREATE TABLE "robot_movement_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the data point */,
  "amplitude" REAL /* Amplitude of the data point */,
  "left_yaw" REAL /* Left yaw angle of the robotic unit */,
  "right_yaw" REAL /* Right yaw angle of the robotic unit */,
  "rot_angle_z" REAL /* Rotation angle around the Z-axis of the robotic unit */,
  "rot_angle_y" REAL /* Rotation angle around the Y-axis of the robotic unit */,
  "rot_angle_x" REAL /* Rotation angle around the X-axis of the robotic unit */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robotic unit that generated the data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that generated the data */,
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration used during the experiment */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that recorded the data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was recorded */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robot_configuration" (
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robotic unit */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the software used */,
  "hardware_version" TEXT /* Version of the hardware used */,
  "configuration_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the researcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)
